'''âl-zh-j-ch''' ('''kalazhjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chauvinize|chauvinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chauvinize|chauvinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-zh-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kalazhjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilazhjechoko|thilazhjechoko]] || [[word:jilazhjechoko|jilazhjechoko]] || [[word:shilazhjechoko|shilazhjechoko]] || [[word:kilazhjechoko|kilazhjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulazhjechoko|thuthulazhjechoko]] || [[word:jujulazhjechoko|jujulazhjechoko]] || [[word:shushulazhjechoko|shushulazhjechoko]] || [[word:kukulazhjechoko|kukulazhjechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholazhjechoko|tholazhjechoko]] || [[word:jolazhjechoko|jolazhjechoko]] || [[word:sholazhjechoko|sholazhjechoko]] || [[word:kolazhjechoko|kolazhjechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlazhjechoko|thĂŠlazhjechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlazhjechoko|jĂŠlazhjechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlazhjechoko|shĂŠlazhjechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlazhjechoko|kĂŠlazhjechoko]]
|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalazhjechithi|shalazhjechithi]] || [[word:shalazhjechiji|shalazhjechiji]] || [[word:shalazhjechishi|shalazhjechishi]] || [[word:shalazhjechiki|shalazhjechiki]]
